description: TEMPLATE — copy a record into a real evidence file (e.g. evidence.knowme.json) when documenting a citable source. Record EXACTLY what the source is (sourceType, school, author, book, edition, publisher, year, page, language, quote, url, license). Never invent references: if you cannot cite a real source, do not create a record. Promote reviewStatus draft → reviewed → verified as the citation is checked; use disputed when sources conflict and deprecated when superseded. Research records link to this via evidenceIds.

records.author: <author name>
records.notes: <context; keep provenance honest and leave fields null until verified>
